W1-FM-01: name the intended message before and after production
single clear target idea rather than open-ended prompt
W1-FM-02: oral plan followed immediately by drawing or labeling
same stable idea with changed representation act
W1-FM-03: prompt for one additional meaningful detail
minimal production frame such as who what or happened
model one representation with more than one idea element
W1-FM-04: stable idea target across drawing dictation and labeling
same message in two production modes
separate meaning failure from format friction
